text.title: Positioning Diff Log Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Current positioning exists AND metric surface available AND ≥1 quarterly iteration?

branch.when: positioning_exists == true AND metric_surface == true AND iterates_quarterly == true
